fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of order that the entry was created in.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the order that the entry was created in.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order that the entry was created in.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip:
Shows the percentage of the unit cost of the assembly item that is made up of indirect costs, such as warehouse handling.
The field is copied from the item card.

Additional Information

Indirect cost percentages are calculated as follows:
Unit Cost (LCY) = Direct Unit Cost × (100% + Indirect Cost %)

Unit Cost = Unit Amount × (100% + Indirect Cost %)

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Shows the indirect cost of the assembled item or produced item as an absolute amount. The value is copied from the posted or finished order.
The amount is added to the items unit cost to reflect overhead, such as freight and warehouse handling that are associated with the assembly or production of the item.

fields.name: Cost is Adjusted
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the cost of the order has been adjusted.

fields.name: Allow Online Adjustment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the items unit cost will be adjusted automatically.
This field is used internally with the Automatic Cost Adjustment setup field.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the cost of one unit of the item.
If the costing method is other than Standard, then the unit cost in this field is automatically calculated and updated on the basis of the unit costs of the components on the production or assembly order lines.
If the costing method is Standard, then this field is not updated, but you can change it manually.

fields.name: Direct Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the direct cost of the quantity posting.
It is the sum of value entries of type Direct Cost that resulted from the posting.

fields.name: Indirect Cost
fields.tooltip: Shows the indirect cost of the produced or assembled item, such as warehouse handling costs that are involved in assembling the item.

fields.name: Single-Level Material Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total material cost of all the items at the first level of the item's BOM.

fields.name: Single-Level Capacity Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the capacity cost of the parent item.
To see the total capacity cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Capacity Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Level Subcontrd. Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the subcontracting cost of the parent item.
To see the total subcontracting cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Subcontracted Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Level Cap. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the capacity overhead cost of the parent item.
To see the total capacity overhead cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Cap. Overhead Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Level Mfg. Ovhd Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the manufacturing overhead cost of the parent item.
To see the total manufacturing overhead cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Mfg. Ovhd Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Direct Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the direct cost of the quantity posting in the additional reporting currency.
It is the sum of value entries of type Direct Cost that resulted from the posting.

fields.name: Indirect Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Shows the indirect cost, in the additional reporting currency, of the produced or assembled item, such as warehouse handling costs that are involved in assembling the item.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Material Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the material cost of the parent item in the additional reporting currency.
To see the total material cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Material Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Capacity Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the capacity cost of the parent item in the additional reporting currency.
To see the total capacity cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Capacity Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Subcontrd Cost(ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the subcontracting cost of the parent item in the additional reporting currency.
To see the total subcontracting cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Subcontracted Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Cap. Ovhd Cost(ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the capacity overhead cost of the parent item in the additional reporting currency.
To see the total overhead capacity cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Cap. Overhead Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Mfg. Ovhd Cost(ACY)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the manufacturing overhead cost of the parent item in the additional reporting currency.
To see the total manufacturing overhead cost of the parent item and its components, see the Rolled-up Mfg. Ovhd Cost field on the item card.

fields.name: Completely Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the entry has been fully invoiced.

fields.name: Is Finished
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the order is finished and that its cost will be adjusted.

fields.name: Single-Lvl Mat. Non-Invt. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total Non-inventory material cost of all components on the parent item's BOM.
